title: Sentence Transformation: Passive Voice & Reported Speech

tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj zdania. Wykorzystując wyrazy podane wielkimi literami, uzupełnij każde zdanie z luką tak, aby precyzyjnie oddać sens zdania wyjściowego. Nie zmieniaj formy podanych wyrazów. W każdą lukę możesz wpisać maksymalnie pięć wyrazów, wliczając w to wyraz już podany.

items.original: Someone stole my bicycle last night.
They are building a new sports hall near our school.
items.transformed: A new sports hall _________ near our school.

items.original: "I have never visited London," said Tom.
items.transformed: Tom said that he had _________ London.

items.original: "Don't touch the paintings," the museum guide told us.
items.transformed: The museum guide told us _________ the paintings.

items.original: People believe that the castle was built in the 12th century.
items.transformed: The castle _________ built in the 12th century.

items.original: "Are you coming to the party tomorrow?" Anna asked me.
items.transformed: Anna asked me _________ to the party the following day.
